- [Fujifilm X-T10 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/fujifilm-x-t10-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Fujifilm X-T10 (2015) — the compact, affordable companion to the X-T1. Covers the estimated ~150,000-actuation lifespan (not officially published by Fujifilm), RAF MakerNote tag 0x1438, the card-format reset caveat, the X-Trans CMOS II sensor, lack of weather sealing, and buying guidance for this popular street photography and travel camera.
- [Fujifilm X-T20 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/fujifilm-x-t20-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Fujifilm X-T20 compact 24.3 MP APS-C mirrorless with retro styling. RAF MakerNote ImageCount tag 0x1438.
- [Fujifilm X-T30 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/fujifilm-x-t30-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Fujifilm X-T30. RAF MakerNote ImageCount tag 0x1438.
- [Fujifilm X-T30 II Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/fujifilm-x-t30-ii-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Fujifilm X-T30 II (2021) — an incremental update to the X-T30 with a new rear LCD and backlit controls. Covers the estimated ~150,000-actuation lifespan (not officially published), RAF MakerNote tag 0x1438, the format-reset caveat, and the differences from the original X-T30.
- [Fujifilm X-T200 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/fujifilm-x-t200-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Fujifilm X-T200. RAF MakerNote ImageCount tag 0x1438.
- [Fujifilm X-A1 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/fujifilm-x-a1-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Fujifilm X-A1 (2013) — the first X-A series mirrorless, Fujifilm's original entry-level X-mount camera. 16.3 MP APS-C Bayer sensor (not X-Trans), tilting 3-inch LCD, Wi-Fi, XC kit lens. Estimated shutter life ~50,000 actuations (not officially published). RAF MakerNote tag 0x1438 (ImageCount) — readable via shuttercount.app. Covers the Bayer vs. X-Trans sensor difference (standard RAW processing compatibility), contrast-detect-only AF, the tilting LCD hinge as a key age-related inspection point, and buying guidance for this over-a-decade-old entry-level body.
- [Fujifilm X-A2 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/fujifilm-x-a2-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Fujifilm X-A2 (2015) — entry-level X-mount mirrorless with a 16.3 MP APS-C Bayer sensor (not X-Trans), 180°-tilting 3-inch LCD for selfie shooting, Wi-Fi, and 16 Film Simulation modes. Estimated ~50,000 actuations (not officially published; lower than later X-A bodies). RAF MakerNote tag 0x1438 (ImageCount) — readable via shuttercount.app. Covers the Bayer vs. X-Trans sensor implication, contrast-detect-only AF limitation, entry-level shutter rating context, and buying guidance for this decade-old compact entry-level body.
- [Fujifilm X-A3 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/fujifilm-x-a3-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Fujifilm X-A3 (2016) — entry-level X-mount mirrorless with a 24.3 MP APS-C Bayer sensor (not X-Trans), tilting 3-inch touchscreen, Wi-Fi, and 19 Film Simulation modes. Estimated ~100,000 actuations (not officially published). RAF MakerNote tag 0x1438 (ImageCount). Covers the Bayer vs. X-Trans workflow difference, the format-reset caveat, and buying guidance for this discontinued compact entry-level body.
- [Fujifilm X-A5 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/fujifilm-x-a5-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Fujifilm X-A5 (2018) — Fujifilm's first X-series camera with 4K video and a 24.2 MP APS-C Bayer sensor (not X-Trans). Entry-level lifestyle mirrorless with tilting touchscreen, Bluetooth, and 19 Film Simulation modes. RAF MakerNote tag 0x1438 (ImageCount). Note: image counter resets on factory reset. Bayer-sensor advantage for standard RAW workflow compatibility. Estimated ~50,000–100,000 actuation lifespan (not officially published).
- [Fujifilm X-A4 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/fujifilm-x-a4-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Fujifilm X-A4 (2020) — Fujifilm's compact entry-level X-mount mirrorless with a 24.2 MP APS-C Bayer sensor (not X-Trans), flip-down 180° selfie LCD, USB-C charging, Eterna Cinema film simulation, and 4K/30p video. Estimated ~100,000–150,000-actuation lifespan (not officially published). RAF MakerNote tag 0x1438 (ImageCount). Covers the format-reset caveat (counter resets on card format), Bayer vs. X-Trans RAW workflow difference, X-A4 vs X-A5 comparison, and buying guidance for this discontinued entry-level body.
- [Fujifilm X-A7 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/fujifilm-x-a7-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Fujifilm X-A7 (2019) — Fujifilm's last X-A series entry-level mirrorless with a 26.1 MP APS-C Bayer sensor (not X-Trans) and large 3.5-inch vari-angle touchscreen. Covers the estimated ~100,000–150,000-actuation lifespan (not officially published), RAF MakerNote tag 0x1438, the format-reset caveat, Bayer vs. X-Trans workflow implications, and buying guidance for this discontinued compact entry-level body.
- [Fujifilm X-M5 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/fujifilm-x-m5-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Fujifilm X-M5 (2024) — Fujifilm's most compact X-mount camera with 26.1 MP X-Trans V sensor and fully articulated LCD. Covers the estimated ~150,000-actuation lifespan, RAF MakerNote tag 0x1438, and buying guidance for this vlog-focused compact.
- [Fujifilm X100F Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/fujifilm-x100f-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Fujifilm X100F fixed-lens compact. RAF MakerNote ImageCount tag 0x1438.
- [Fujifilm X100 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/fujifilm-x100-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the original Fujifilm X100 (2010) — the camera that launched the modern premium fixed-lens compact category. 12.3 MP APS-C EXR CMOS sensor (Bayer, not X-Trans), fixed Fujinon 23 mm f/2 leaf shutter, hybrid OVF/EVF. Estimated shutter life ~100,000 actuations (not officially published; leaf shutter characteristics differ from focal-plane shutters). RAF MakerNote tag 0x1438 (ImageCount) — readable via shuttercount.app. Important caveat: the counter resets on memory card format, so the displayed count reflects shots since the last format, not total lifetime actuations. Covers the Bayer vs. X-Trans distinction (the original X100 uses a conventional Bayer sensor), leaf shutter flash sync advantage (full sync at all speeds up to 1/1000s), aperture blade oil contamination as the key used-body inspection point, and comparison with the X100S (on-chip PDAF, X-Trans sensor, higher shutter rating).
- [Fujifilm X100S Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/fujifilm-x100s-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Fujifilm X100S (2013) — the camera that introduced on-chip phase-detection AF to the X100 series. 16.3 MP X-Trans CMOS II sensor, fixed 23mm f/2 leaf shutter. Rated ~300,000 actuations. RAF MakerNote tag 0x1438.
- [Fujifilm X100T Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/fujifilm-x100t-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Fujifilm X100T (2014) — added OVF inset electronic display and Classic Chrome film simulation over the X100S. Same 16.3 MP X-Trans CMOS II sensor and 23mm f/2 leaf shutter. Rated ~300,000 actuations. RAF MakerNote tag 0x1438.
- [Fujifilm X70 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/fujifilm-x70-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Fujifilm X70 (2016) — a compact fixed-lens APS-C camera with a 16.3 MP X-Trans CMOS II sensor and 18.5mm f/2.8 lens (28mm full-frame equivalent). Designed as a wider, more pocketable complement to the X100 series with a tilting touchscreen but no optical viewfinder. Estimated shutter life ~100,000 actuations (not officially published). Shutter count readable from RAF MakerNote ImageCount tag 0x1438 via shuttercount.app. Covers X70 vs X100T differences (18.5mm vs 23mm, no OVF, smaller body), note that the X70 has no successor (discontinued 2018 without a follow-up), lens element and aperture blade inspection as key used-camera check points, and buying guidance for this cult street photography compact.
- [Fujifilm X100V Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/fujifilm-x100v-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Fujifilm X100V iconic premium compact. Rated lifespan: 300,000 actuations.
- [Fujifilm GFX100 II Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/fujifilm-gfx100-ii-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Fujifilm GFX100 II medium format mirrorless. RAF MakerNote ImageCount tag 0x1438.
- [Fujifilm GFX 100 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/fujifilm-gfx100-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Fujifilm GFX 100 (2019) — the first 102 MP medium format mirrorless camera with IBIS and 4K video. Covers the 150,000-actuation rated shutter (not officially published by Fujifilm), how to read from RAF files via MakerNote tag 0x1438, the format-reset caveat, electronic shutter impact on wear (zero mechanical wear), shutter replacement cost (~€500–900), and GFX 100 vs GFX 100S buying comparison.
- [Fujifilm GFX100S Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/fujifilm-gfx100s-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Fujifilm GFX100S (2021) — the original 102 MP compact medium format mirrorless camera. Covers the 150,000-actuation rated shutter, how to read from RAF files via MakerNote tag 0x1438, shutter replacement cost considerations, and how the GFX100S compares to the GFX100S II for used-camera buyers.
- [Fujifilm GFX 50S II Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/fujifilm-gfx50s-ii-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Fujifilm GFX 50S II medium format mirrorless. Rated lifespan: 150,000 actuations.
- [Fujifilm GFX 50S Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/fujifilm-gfx50s-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Fujifilm GFX 50S (2017) — the camera that launched the GFX medium format system. Covers the 150,000-actuation rated shutter, RAF MakerNote ImageCount tag 0x1438, the format-reset caveat, why medium format shutters have lower ratings than APS-C, shutter replacement cost (~€300–500), and buying guidance for this landmark 51.4 MP camera compared to the GFX 50S II.
- [Fujifilm X-T100 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/fujifilm-x-t100-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Fujifilm X-T100 (2018) — entry-level X-mount mirrorless notable for its retro OM-inspired body and a 24.2 MP Bayer APS-C sensor (not X-Trans, unlike most X-series cameras). Covers the ~100,000-actuation rated shutter, RAF MakerNote ImageCount tag 0x1438, the Bayer vs. X-Trans workflow implications for third-party RAW processors, and buying guidance comparing the X-T100 to its successor the X-T200.

## OM System / Olympus Camera Shutter Count Pages

- [OM System OM-1 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/olympus-om-1-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the OM System OM-1 flagship Micro Four Thirds mirrorless camera. Rated at 400,000 actuations. Notes that in-file shutter count is not confirmed for OM System ORF files and recommends checking via the camera menu.
- [OM System OM-1 Mark II Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/om-system-om-1-mark-ii-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the OM System OM-1 Mark II (2024). Covers the 400,000-actuation rated shutter life, improvements over the original OM-1 (expanded AI AF, 120 fps burst, 4K/120p video), and how to check the count via camera menu since ORF files do not store a confirmed shutter-count tag.
- [OM System OM-3 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/om-system-om-3-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the OM System OM-3 (2024) — the 20 MP Micro Four Thirds enthusiast mirrorless camera. Covers the ~150,000-actuation estimated shutter life, why ORF files do not reliably store a shutter count tag, how to check via Setup Menu → Number of Shutter Releases, Pro Capture mode impact (electronic shutter only, no mechanical wear), weather sealing (IP53), and comparison with OM-1 Mark II for buyers choosing between enthusiast and flagship MFT bodies.
- [OM System OM-5 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/om-system-om-5-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the OM System OM-5 (2022) mid-range Micro Four Thirds mirrorless camera. Estimated shutter life around 200,000 actuations (not officially rated by OM System). Explains the difference from the OM-1, weather sealing features, and how to check via camera menu.
- [OM System OM-5 Mark II Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/om-system-om-5-mark-ii-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the OM System OM-5 Mark II (2024) — the updated mid-range Micro Four Thirds camera adding improved AI subject-recognition AF, 4K/60p video, updated OM-Log, and up to 7.5-stop IBIS over the original OM-5. Estimated shutter life ~150,000 actuations (not officially rated by OM System). ORF files do not reliably embed the shutter count — camera menu method recommended. Covers OM-5 vs OM-5 Mark II differences, electronic shutter impact (no mechanical wear), and what to inspect when buying used.
- [Olympus PEN-F Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/olympus-pen-f-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Olympus PEN-F (2016) — the only PEN-series body with a built-in EVF and the highest-resolution Olympus MFT camera at launch (20.3 MP). Features dual Creative Control dials, 5-axis IBIS, tilting touchscreen, and a premium retro rangefinder design. Rated ~200,000 actuations (not officially published). ORF files do not store a confirmed shutter-count tag — check via Setup → Camera Information. Covers the unique Creative Control interface, PEN-F vs E-M5 Mark II comparison, and buying guidance for this discontinued premium compact.
- [Olympus OM-D E-M1 Mark II Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/olympus-em1-mark-ii-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Olympus OM-D E-M1 Mark II (2016). Covers the 200,000-actuation rated shutter, how to check via camera menu or ExifTool MakerNote since ORF files don't store a confirmed shutter-count tag, and buying guidance for this classic pro M4/3 body with 5.5-stop IBIS.
- [Olympus OM-D E-M1 Mark III Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/olympus-em1-mark-iii-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Olympus OM-D E-M1 Mark III (2020). Covers the 200,000-actuation rated shutter, computational photography modes (Handheld High-Res Shot, Live ND) that use the electronic shutter, ORF file behavior, and how to check via camera menu.
- [Olympus OM-D E-M1X Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/olympus-em1x-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Olympus OM-D E-M1X (2019) — the professional dual-grip Micro Four Thirds flagship. Covers the 400,000-actuation rated shutter, why ORF files do not reliably store a shutter count tag, how to check via Setup Menu (Total Shot Count), Pro Capture mode impact (electronic shutter only, no mechanical wear), 18 fps mechanical burst impact on shutter wear, and buying guidance for this specialist high-speed sports body.
- [Olympus OM-D E-M5 Mark III Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/olympus-em5-mark-iii-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Olympus OM-D E-M5 Mark III (2019) compact mid-range Micro Four Thirds camera. Estimated shutter life ~150,000 actuations. Covers IP53 weather sealing, 7.5-stop IBIS, Handheld High-Res Shot, ORF file behavior (count not confirmed in file), and how to check via camera menu.
- [Olympus OM-D E-M10 Mark IV Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/olympus-em10-mark-iv-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Olympus OM-D E-M10 Mark IV (2020) entry-level Micro Four Thirds camera. Estimated shutter life ~100,000 actuations (not officially rated). Covers the absence of weather sealing, 4.5-stop IBIS, ORF file behavior, and what to check when buying this popular beginner camera used.
- [Olympus OM-D E-M10 Mark III Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/olympus-em10-mark-iii-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Olympus OM-D E-M10 Mark III (2017) entry-level Micro Four Thirds camera. Estimated shutter life ~100,000 actuations (not officially rated). Covers the 16.1 MP sensor, 4-stop 5-axis IBIS, 4K/30p video, lack of weather sealing, ORF file behavior (count not confirmed in file), and how to check via camera INFO screen or ExifTool.
- [Olympus OM-D E-M10 Mark II Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/olympus-em10-mark-ii-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Olympus OM-D E-M10 Mark II (2015) — the first E-M10 with a built-in EVF and fully articulating flip-down touchscreen. Estimated shutter life ~100,000 actuations (not officially rated by Olympus). Covers the 16.1 MP LiveMOS sensor, 4-stop 5-axis IBIS, absence of weather sealing, ORF file behavior (count not confirmed in file), how to check via camera INFO screen or ExifTool, and the screen hinge as a key used-camera inspection point.
- [Olympus OM-D E-M10 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/olympus-em10-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the original Olympus OM-D E-M10 (2014) — the entry-level OM-D that brought the EVF-equipped OM-D design to a lighter, more affordable body. 16.1 MP Live MOS Micro Four Thirds sensor, 3-axis IBIS, built-in Wi-Fi. Estimated shutter life ~100,000 actuations (not officially rated). Covers ORF file behavior (count embedded in MakerNote, readable via shuttercount.app), contrast-detect-only AF, and buying guidance for this popular budget mirrorless entry point.
- [Olympus OM-D E-M5 Mark II Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/olympus-em5-mark-ii-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Olympus OM-D E-M5 Mark II (2015) — compact, IP53-rated weather-sealed Micro Four Thirds camera with 16.1 MP sensor, 5-axis IBIS, and a fully articulating LCD. Covers the ~150,000-actuation rated shutter, ORF file behavior (count not confirmed in file), how to check via camera menu, 40 MP High Resolution Shot (tripod mode), and buying guidance for this popular travel camera.
- [Olympus OM-D E-M5 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/olympus-em5-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the original Olympus OM-D E-M5 (2012) — the landmark first-generation OM-D that brought weather-sealed Micro Four Thirds to enthusiast photographers. 16.1 MP LiveMOS sensor, IPX1 splash/dust-proofing, 5-axis IBIS, ORF format. Estimated ~150,000 actuations. ORF files do not reliably store the shutter count (undocumented/encrypted MakerNote tag, firmware-dependent). Covers how to check via Setup menu (Total Shot Count), ExifTool as secondary option, what to inspect on this 12+ year old body, and comparison with the E-M5 Mark II.
- [Olympus OM-D E-M1 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/olympus-em1-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the original Olympus OM-D E-M1 (2013) — the first Olympus OM-D flagship designed to replace the Four Thirds DSLR system, with dual PDAF+CDAF hybrid AF for legacy lens support and IPX1 weather sealing. Covers the ~150,000-actuation rated shutter, ORF file behavior (count not confirmed in file), how to check via camera menu, Four Thirds adapter shooting patterns that increase shutter count, and buying guidance for this 10+ year old pro M4/3 body.
- [Olympus PEN E-PL9 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/olympus-pen-e-pl9-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Olympus PEN E-PL9 (2018) — entry-level Micro Four Thirds mirrorless with a 16 MP Live MOS sensor, 4K/30p video (5-minute clip limit), 3-axis IBIS, built-in pop-up flash, 180°-tilting 3-inch touchscreen, and Bluetooth. Estimated shutter life ~100,000 actuations (not officially published). ORF files do not reliably embed the count — check via Setup menu (Shutter Count) or ExifTool. Covers E-PL9 vs E-PL8 improvements (4K video, Bluetooth), E-PL9 vs E-PL10 differences (minimal — firmware/cosmetics only), 3-axis IBIS limitation vs 5-axis in E-M series, and the tilting LCD hinge as the key inspection point when buying used.
- [Olympus PEN E-PL10 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/olympus-pen-e-pl10-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Olympus PEN E-PL10 (2019) — the last Olympus-branded PEN entry-level camera before the OM System rebrand. 16 MP Live MOS sensor, 4K/30p video (5-minute clip limit), 3-axis IBIS (~2 stops), built-in pop-up flash, 180°-tilting 3-inch touchscreen, Bluetooth and Wi-Fi, expanded Art Filter options vs E-PL9. Estimated shutter life ~100,000 actuations (not officially published). ORF files may not reliably embed the count — most reliable method is MENU → Setup (wrench) → Shutter Count in-camera. Covers E-PL10 vs E-PL9 differences (minimal — Art Filters and minor cosmetics), full MFT lens compatibility, LCD hinge and battery as the key inspection points when buying used.
- [Olympus PEN E-PL7 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/olympus-pen-e-pl7-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Olympus PEN E-PL7 (2014) — stylish entry-level Micro Four Thirds mirrorless with a 16 MP Live MOS sensor, 3-axis IBIS, 180°-tilting selfie touchscreen, and built-in Wi-Fi. Estimated shutter life ~100,000 actuations (not officially published). ORF files do not store a confirmed shutter-count tag — check via MENU → Setup → Camera Information. Covers E-PL7 vs E-PL9 improvements (4K video, Bluetooth added later), the 3-axis vs 5-axis IBIS difference vs OM-D series, lack of weather sealing, LCD hinge condition as the primary used-camera inspection point, and MFT lens ecosystem compatibility.
- [Olympus PEN E-PL8 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/olympus-pen-e-pl8-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Olympus PEN E-PL8 (2016) — slim retro-styled entry-level Micro Four Thirds mirrorless with a 16 MP Live MOS sensor, TruePic VII image processor, 3-axis IBIS, tilting 3-inch touchscreen, and minimal flat body design. Estimated shutter life ~100,000 actuations (not officially published). ORF files do not reliably embed the count — check via MENU → Setup → Camera Information. Covers E-PL8 vs E-PL7 differences (minimal; refined body design), E-PL8 vs E-PL9 differences (E-PL9 added 4K video, Bluetooth, pop-up flash), lack of built-in flash on the E-PL8, 3-axis IBIS vs 5-axis in E-M series, LCD hinge condition as key inspection point when buying used, and full MFT lens ecosystem compatibility.

## Panasonic Camera Shutter Count Pages

- [Panasonic Lumix S9 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/panasonic-s9-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Panasonic Lumix S9 (2024). The S9 uses a fully electronic shutter — no mechanical shutter exists, so traditional shutter count does not apply. Explains what to check instead when buying used.
- [Panasonic Lumix S5 II Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/panasonic-lumix-s5-ii-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Panasonic Lumix S5 II (2023). Covers the 200,000-actuation rated mechanical shutter, why Panasonic does not store shutter count in RW2 files, how to check via camera menu or Lumix Sync app, and the difference between S5 II and S5 IIX.
- [Panasonic Lumix S5 IIX Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/panasonic-lumix-s5-iix-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Panasonic Lumix DC-S5M2X / S5 IIX (2023) — the video-optimized variant of the S5 II adding Apple ProRes internal recording, RAW HDMI output, All-Intra compression, and USB streaming. Covers the 200,000-actuation rated mechanical shutter, why RW2 files don't store the count, how to check via camera menu or Lumix Sync app, and S5 II vs S5 IIX differences for stills and video shooters.
- [Panasonic Lumix GH6 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/panasonic-lumix-gh6-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Panasonic Lumix GH6 (2022). Covers the 200,000-actuation rated shutter, why RW2 files don't store the count, the impact of video-heavy use on mechanical shutter wear, and buying guidance for this video-first camera.
- [Panasonic Lumix GH5 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/panasonic-lumix-gh5-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the iconic Panasonic Lumix GH5 (2017). Covers the 200,000-actuation rated shutter, how to check via camera menu since RW2 files don't include the count, and why video-focused GH5 bodies often have very low mechanical shutter counts despite heavy use.
- [Panasonic Lumix GH5S Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/panasonic-lumix-gh5s-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Panasonic Lumix GH5S (2018) — the video-specialist variant of the GH5 with a 10.2 MP Multi-Aspect Micro Four Thirds sensor (larger photosites for low-light), Dual Native ISO up to ISO 51200, Cinema 4K at 60fps, 4:2:2 10-bit internal recording, and V-Log L built-in. Rated 200,000 actuations. RW2 RAW format; shutter count readable via ShutterCount (Panasonic MakerNote). Key caveats: no IBIS (unlike GH5), very low mechanical shutter counts expected on video-primary bodies. Covers GH5 vs GH5S differences, what to inspect on a used GH5S (HDMI port, audio jack, fan, battery), and buying guidance for videographers.
- [Panasonic Lumix G9 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/panasonic-lumix-g9-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Panasonic Lumix G9 (2017) stills-focused Micro Four Thirds flagship. Covers the 200,000-actuation rated shutter, RW2 file behavior (count not embedded), how to check via camera menu, the G9's 20 fps burst capability, and 6.5-stop Dual IS 2 IBIS system.
- [Panasonic Lumix G85 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/panasonic-lumix-g85-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Panasonic Lumix G85 (G80 outside North America, 2016). Covers the 200,000-actuation rated shutter, why RW2 files don't store the count, weather sealing (splash/dust), 5-axis Dual IS 2 IBIS, and 4K Photo mode which uses the electronic shutter and adds no mechanical wear.
- [Panasonic Lumix GX85 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/panasonic-lumix-gx85-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Panasonic Lumix GX85 (GX80 in Europe, GX7 Mark II in Japan, 2016) — compact rangefinder-style Micro Four Thirds mirrorless with 16 MP no-OLPF Live MOS sensor, 5-axis Dual IS 2 IBIS, and 4K Photo mode. Estimated shutter life ~200,000 actuations (Panasonic does not publish official rating). RW2 files do not embed the count — check via Setup menu (Shutter Count) or Lumix Sync app. 4K Photo uses electronic shutter (no mechanical wear). Covers GX85 vs GX80 naming, used-camera inspection tips.
- [Panasonic Lumix GH7 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/panasonic-lumix-gh7-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Panasonic Lumix GH7 (2024), the latest GH flagship and first GH camera with phase-detection AF. Covers the 200,000-actuation rated shutter, RW2 file behavior, internal ProRes recording, and why video-heavy use results in very low mechanical shutter counts.
- [Panasonic Lumix GH1 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/panasonic-lumix-gh1-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Panasonic Lumix GH1 (DMC-GH1, 2009) — the landmark first consumer camera with 1080i AVCHD video recording and the first GH-series body. 12.1 MP Live MOS Multi-Aspect Micro Four Thirds sensor (4:3/3:2/16:9 from the same sensor area). Estimated shutter life ~150,000 actuations (not officially published). RW2 files do not embed the count — check via Setup menu (Shutter Count). Video recording does not increment the mechanical counter. Covers Multi-Aspect sensor design, the community AVCHD bitrate hack that preceded PTOOL, inspection points for this 15+ year old body, and GH1 vs GH2 buying comparison.
- [Panasonic Lumix GH2 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/panasonic-lumix-gh2-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Panasonic Lumix GH2 (DMC-GH2, 2010) — the legendary video camera whose PTOOL firmware hack enabled dramatically higher AVCHD bitrates, making it a favourite of independent filmmakers. 16.05 MP Live MOS Multi-Aspect MFT sensor, improved 1080p 60i/50i video. Estimated shutter life ~150,000 actuations (not officially published). RW2 files do not embed the count — check via Setup menu (Shutter Count). PTOOL hack does not affect shutter counter accuracy. Covers the PTOOL history and heat generation from high-bitrate recording, why video-heavy bodies often show very low mechanical shutter counts, and used-camera buying guidance.
- [Panasonic Lumix GH3 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/panasonic-lumix-gh3-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Panasonic Lumix GH3 (2012) — the first weather-sealed GH body with a magnesium alloy chassis, 16.05 MP MFT sensor, and 1080/60p video. Rated 200,000 actuations. RW2 files do not embed the count — check via camera menu (Setup → Shutter Count) or ExifTool. Video recording does not increment the mechanical counter, so video-heavy bodies may have very low counts despite years of use.
- [Panasonic Lumix GH4 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/panasonic-lumix-gh4-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Panasonic Lumix GH4 (2014) — the first consumer camera with internal 4K/UHD video. Covers the 150,000-actuation rated shutter, why RW2 files don't store the count, how to check via camera menu or ExifTool, and why video-heavy use results in very low mechanical shutter counts on used GH4 bodies.
- [Panasonic Lumix S5 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/panasonic-lumix-s5-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Panasonic Lumix S5 (2020) — Panasonic's entry-level full-frame L-mount mirrorless camera. Covers the 200,000-actuation rated shutter, why RW2 files don't store the count, how to check via camera menu or Lumix Sync app, and buying guidance for this popular full-frame/video hybrid.
- [Panasonic Lumix G9 II Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/panasonic-lumix-g9-ii-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Panasonic Lumix G9 II (2023) — the first G-series camera with phase-detection AF. Covers the 200,000-actuation rated shutter, why RW2 files don't store the count, how to check via camera menu, and why its high-speed burst capability doesn't wear the mechanical shutter when using electronic shutter mode.
- [Panasonic Lumix G7 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/panasonic-lumix-g7-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Panasonic Lumix G7 (2015) — one of the first consumer cameras with internal 4K video. Covers the 200,000-actuation rated shutter, why RW2 files don't store the count, how to check via camera menu or Lumix Image App, 4K Photo mode (electronic shutter only, no mechanical wear), and buying guidance for this widely available used camera.
- [Panasonic Lumix G6 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/panasonic-lumix-g6-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Panasonic Lumix G6 (2013) — Panasonic's mid-range Micro Four Thirds mirrorless with a 16 MP Live MOS sensor, fully articulating touchscreen, built-in EVF, and 7 fps burst. Estimated shutter life ~100,000 actuations (Panasonic does not publish official ratings). Covers why RW2 files do not store the shutter count (consistent Panasonic design), how to check via Setup menu → Shutter Count, video recording vs mechanical shutter wear, and buying guidance for this popular pre-4K travel camera.
- [Panasonic Lumix GX9 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/panasonic-lumix-gx9-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Panasonic Lumix GX9 (2018) — the only GX camera with a built-in tilting EVF and a no-AA-filter 20 MP MOS sensor. Estimated shutter life ~200,000 actuations (Panasonic does not publish official rating for the GX9). Covers why RW2 files don't store the count, how to check via camera menu or Lumix Sync app, 5-axis Dual IS 2, silent 4K/30p via electronic shutter (no mechanical wear), and the tilting EVF as a key inspection point when buying used.
- [Panasonic Lumix GX7 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/panasonic-lumix-gx7-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Panasonic Lumix GX7 (2013) — Panasonic's enthusiast rangefinder-style Micro Four Thirds mirrorless that introduced 3-axis in-body image stabilisation (IBIS) to the GX line. 16 MP Live MOS sensor, built-in tilting OLED EVF (2,764k dots), 3-inch tilting touchscreen, Dual I.S. (IBIS + OIS), built-in pop-up flash, 5 fps burst, Full HD 1080/50p video, DMW-BLG10 battery, Micro Four Thirds mount. Estimated shutter life ~150,000 actuations (Panasonic does not publish official rating). RW2 files do not embed the count — check via Setup menu (Shutter Count). Covers GX7 vs GX8 differences (GX8 adds 20 MP and 4K), the tilting EVF hinge as key used-market inspection point, IBIS verification method, and buying guidance for street and travel photographers.
- [Panasonic Lumix S1 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/panasonic-lumix-s1-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Panasonic Lumix S1 (2019) — the original full-frame L-mount mirrorless body from the L-Mount Alliance. Covers the high 400,000-actuation rated shutter, why RW2 files don't embed the count, how to check via camera menu or Lumix Sync, and buying guidance for this professional-grade full-frame body.
- [Panasonic Lumix S1R Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/panasonic-lumix-s1r-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Panasonic Lumix S1R (2019) — Panasonic's 47.3 MP high-resolution full-frame L-mount mirrorless camera. Covers the 400,000-actuation rated shutter, why RW2 files don't store the count, the important caveat that High Resolution Shot mode consumes 8 mechanical actuations per composite image, and buying guidance.
- [Panasonic Lumix S1 II Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/panasonic-lumix-s1-ii-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Panasonic Lumix S1 II (2025) — Panasonic's updated 24 MP full-frame L-mount mirrorless camera with phase-detection AF. Covers the ~200,000–300,000 actuation estimated shutter life, why RW2 files never store the count (consistent Panasonic design), how to check via Setup Menu (Shutter Count) or Lumix Sync app, the important caveat that video recording does not increment the mechanical shutter counter, L-Mount Alliance compatibility (Leica SL2, Sigma fp L), and buying guidance comparing S1 II vs S5 II for hybrid shooters.
- [Panasonic Lumix S1H Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/panasonic-lumix-s1h-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Panasonic Lumix S1H (2019) — the world's first Netflix-certified full-frame mirrorless camera. Covers the ~200,000-actuation rated shutter, why RW2 files don't store the count, the critical caveat that video-heavy use does not increment the mechanical counter, how to check via camera menu, and buying guidance for this cinema-focused L-mount body.
- [Panasonic Lumix G90/G95 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/panasonic-lumix-g90-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Panasonic Lumix G90 (G95 in North America, 2019) — mid-range Micro Four Thirds mirrorless with 20.3 MP Dual Native ISO sensor, 5-axis Dual IS 2 IBIS, weather sealing, and V-Log L pre-installed. Estimated shutter life ~200,000 actuations (not officially published). Covers why RW2 files don't store the count, how to check via camera menu, 4K Photo mode (electronic shutter, no mechanical wear), and the G90 vs G95 naming difference.
- [Panasonic Lumix G100 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/panasonic-lumix-g100-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Panasonic Lumix G100 (DC-G100 / G110 in Europe, 2020) — compact vlog-oriented Micro Four Thirds camera with 20.3 MP sensor, 3-axis IBIS, and built-in directional 3-mic audio. Estimated shutter life ~200,000 actuations (not officially published). RW2 files do not embed the count — check via camera menu or Lumix Sync app. 4K Photo mode uses electronic shutter (no mechanical wear). Covers G100 vs G110 naming, video vs stills shutter count behaviour, and used-camera buying guidance.
- [Panasonic Lumix G100D Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/panasonic-lumix-g100d-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Panasonic Lumix G100D (DC-G100D, 2023) — updated version of the G100 vlogging camera, replacing the standard hot shoe with a Multi Interface Shoe for native XLR audio adapter compatibility. 20.3 MP Micro Four Thirds sensor, estimated shutter life ~100,000 actuations (not officially published). RW2 files do not embed the count — check via camera Setup menu or Lumix Sync app. 4K Photo mode uses electronic shutter (no mechanical wear). Covers G100D vs G100 key difference (Multi Interface Shoe), and used-camera vlogging-focused buying guidance.
- [Panasonic Lumix GH5 II Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/panasonic-lumix-gh5-ii-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Panasonic Lumix GH5 II (2021) — incremental upgrade to the GH5 adding phase-detect assist AF, BLK22 battery (800 shots vs 410 on GH5), unlimited 4K/60p recording, and improved live streaming. Rated 200,000 actuations (same as GH5). RW2 files do not embed the count — check via camera menu (Setup → Body Battery Info) or Lumix Sync app. Video recording does not increment the mechanical counter; many used GH5 II bodies have very low mechanical shutter counts despite heavy video use.
- [Panasonic Lumix GX8 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/panasonic-lumix-gx8-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Panasonic Lumix GX8 (2015) — the flagship GX-series body that introduced a tilting built-in EVF, 4K video, Dual I.S., and a 20.3 MP no-AA Dual Native ISO sensor to the GX line. Estimated shutter life ~200,000 actuations (Panasonic does not publish official rating). RW2 files do not store the count — check via camera Setup menu (Shutter Count) or ExifTool. 4K Photo mode uses electronic shutter (no mechanical wear). Covers GX8 vs GX85 vs GX9 comparisons and used-camera buying guidance for this decade-old enthusiast rangefinder-style body.
- [Panasonic Lumix G5 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/panasonic-lumix-g5-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Panasonic Lumix G5 (DMC-G5, 2012) — Panasonic's mid-range Micro Four Thirds mirrorless with a 12.1 MP Live MOS sensor, fully articulating touchscreen, built-in EVF, and Full HD 1080p/60fps video. Estimated shutter life ~100,000 actuations (not officially published). RW2 files do not store the shutter count — check via camera Setup menu (Shutter Count) or ExifTool. Covers G5 vs G6 sensor upgrade, video mode vs mechanical shutter wear, articulating screen hinge as key inspection point on this 12+ year old body, and buying guidance.

## Pentax Camera Shutter Count Pages

- [Pentax K-70 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/pentax-k-70-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Pentax K-70 (2016) mid-range APS-C DSLR. Covers the ~100,000-actuation rated shutter, how to extract count from PEF RAW files via ExifTool (PEF not yet supported in the browser tool), camera menu method, 100 weather seals with -10°C cold resistance, SR IBIS (4.5 stops) with all K-mount lenses including vintage glass, Pixel Shift Resolution System (4× shutter use per scene), and how the K-70 compares to the K-3 Mark III.
- [Pentax K-1 Mark II Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/pentax-k-1-mark-ii-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Pentax K-1 Mark II (2018) — Pentax's only full-frame DSLR. Covers the ~300,000-actuation rated shutter, how to extract the count from PEF RAW files via ExifTool (PEF not yet supported in shuttercount.app browser tool), camera menu method, weather sealing, and IBIS with Pixel Shift Resolution.
- [Pentax K-3 Mark III Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/pentax-k-3-mark-iii-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Pentax K-3 Mark III (2021) APS-C flagship DSLR. Covers the ~300,000-actuation rated shutter, PEF ExifTool extraction method, built-in GPS Astrotracer II, 92-point weather sealing, and buying guidance for this sports and wildlife photographer's DSLR.
- [Pentax K-1 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/pentax-k-1-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Pentax K-1 (2016) — Pentax's first full-frame DSLR. Covers the ~300,000-actuation rated shutter, how to extract the count from PEF RAW files via ExifTool (PEF not yet supported in the browser tool), 87 weather seals, 36.4 MP sensor, Pixel Shift Resolution System, and how Pixel Shift use multiplies shutter actuations 4× per scene.
- [Pentax K-3 Mark II Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/pentax-k-3-mark-ii-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Pentax K-3 Mark II (2015) APS-C DSLR. Covers the ~200,000-actuation rated shutter, PEF MakerNote ExifTool extraction (PEF not yet supported in the browser tool), built-in GPS with AstroTracer, Real Resolution (Pixel Shift) system, and what to check when buying used — including GPS function and weather sealing.
- [Pentax K-3 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/pentax-k-3-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Pentax K-3 (2013) — Pentax's APS-C flagship that introduced the AA filter simulator (piezoelectric sensor vibration), dual SD card slots, 100% OVF coverage, 8.3 fps burst, and 27 weather seals. 24.35 MP APS-C sensor. Rated ~200,000 actuations. Shutter count accessible via camera menu (MENU → Set-up → Camera Information) or PEF MakerNote ExifTool (exiftool -ShutterCount yourfile.PEF). PEF not yet supported in the browser tool. Covers K-3 vs K-3 Mark II differences (GPS added in Mk II), AA filter simulator impact, Pixel Shift Resolution (4× actuations per scene), and used-camera buying guidance for this 2013 flagship body.
- [Pentax KP Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/pentax-kp-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Pentax KP (2017) — Pentax's most compact weather-sealed APS-C DSLR. Estimated shutter life ~100,000 actuations (not officially published). Covers PEF MakerNote ExifTool extraction (PEF not yet supported in the browser tool), the unique modular grip system (three interchangeable grips), 5-axis SR III IBIS (5 stops), 87 weather seals, AA filter simulator with three levels, Pixel Shift Resolution (4× shutter actuations per scene), and how the KP compares to the K-70 and K-3 Mark II.
- [Pentax K-S1 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/pentax-k-s1-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Pentax K-S1 (2014) — entry-level APS-C DSLR notable for its distinctive LED illumination ring around the lens mount and colourful body options. 20.1 MP APS-C sensor, 3-axis SR IBIS, 11-point SAFOX X phase-detect AF, built-in Wi-Fi, 10 dust-resistant seal points (not fully weatherproofed). Estimated shutter life ~100,000 actuations (not officially published). PEF MakerNote — ExifTool reliable: exiftool -ShutterCount yourfile.PEF. PEF not yet supported in the browser tool. Covers the K-S1 vs K-S2 differences (102 weather seals on K-S2, articulating LCD), LED illumination ring inspection on used bodies, and buying guidance for this now-decade-old entry-level K-mount DSLR.
- [Pentax K-50 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/pentax-k-50-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Pentax K-50 (2013) — entry-level weather-sealed APS-C DSLR with 86 dust and water-resistant seals, 16.3 MP APS-C CMOS sensor, Shake Reduction (SR) IBIS, and AA battery compatibility. Estimated shutter life ~100,000 actuations (not officially published). PEF MakerNote — ExifTool reliable: exiftool -ShutterCount yourfile.PEF. PEF not yet supported in the browser tool; access via camera menu (MENU → Set-up → Camera Information) or ExifTool on desktop. Covers K-50 vs K-30 differences (86 vs 77 seals), K-50 vs K-S1 differences (weather sealing vs style, AA vs proprietary battery), AA battery compartment corrosion as key inspection point on older units, SR IBIS with vintage K-mount lenses, and buying guidance for outdoor and nature photographers on a budget.
- [Pentax KF Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/pentax-kf-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Pentax KF (2022) — Pentax's most recent entry-to-mid-range APS-C DSLR and effectively a refreshed KP. 24.2 MP APS-C sensor, built-in GPS with AstroTracer, 5-axis SR II IBIS (4.5 stops), 102 weather seals (-10°C), tilting 3-inch LCD, 6 fps burst. Estimated shutter life ~100,000 actuations (not officially published). PEF MakerNote ExifTool extraction (PEF not yet supported in the browser tool). Covers the KF vs KP differences (built-in GPS, tilting LCD), AstroTracer function and its shutter-count implications, and buying guidance for this recently discontinued K-mount entry body.
- [Pentax K-S2 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/pentax-k-s2-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Pentax K-S2 (2015) — mid-range APS-C DSLR featuring 102 weather seals (AW, -10°C), a fully articulating 3-inch LCD (first in a Pentax consumer DSLR), built-in Wi-Fi and NFC, and the same 20 MP sensor as the flagship K-3 Mark II. Estimated shutter life ~100,000 actuations (not officially published). Shutter count embedded in PEF MakerNote — ExifTool reliable: exiftool -ShutterCount yourfile.PEF. Also supports DNG output with count preserved. PEF not yet supported in the browser tool. Covers K-S2 vs K-S1 improvements (weather sealing, articulating screen), articulating LCD hinge as key inspection point when buying used.

## Leica Camera Shutter Count Pages

- [Leica Q2 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/leica-q2-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Leica Q2 (2019) — Leica's flagship 47.3 MP full-frame fixed-lens compact with Summilux 28mm f/1.7 ASPH. Also covers the Q2 Monochrom. Records native DNG files; shutter count readable from EXIF. Estimated shutter life ~200,000 actuations (not officially published by Leica). Covers Leica service costs, electronic shutter mode impact, how to verify count when buying used, and why Leica DNG output makes shutter count easy to read.
- [Leica Q3 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/leica-q3-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Leica Q3 (2023) — Leica's 60 MP full-frame fixed-lens compact with Summilux 28mm f/1.7 ASPH. Also covers the Q3 43 (40mm lens variant). Records native DNG files; shutter count readable from EXIF. Estimated shutter life ~200,000 actuations (not officially published by Leica). Covers comparison with the Q2, Leica service costs, electronic shutter mode impact, and how to verify count when buying used.
- [Leica M11 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/leica-m11-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Leica M11 (2022) — Leica's 60 MP full-frame rangefinder flagship. Also covers the M11 Monochrom. Records native DNG files; shutter count readable from EXIF. Estimated shutter life ~150,000 actuations (not officially published by Leica). The M11 uses a mechanical cloth focal-plane shutter with no electronic shutter option — every release increments the count. Covers Leica M service costs (~€500–1,000 for shutter work), comparison with the M10, and how to verify count when buying used.
- [Leica M10 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/leica-m10-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Leica M10 (type 3656, 2017) — Leica's 24 MP full-frame rangefinder that revived the classic M form factor with a slimmer body. Also covers all M10 variants: M10-P, M10-D, M10-R, and M10 Monochrom. Records native DNG files; shutter count readable from EXIF. Estimated shutter life ~150,000 actuations (not officially published by Leica). Cloth focal-plane shutter; no electronic shutter option. Covers Leica M service costs and comparison with the M11.
- [Leica M10-P Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/leica-m10-p-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Leica M10-P (type 3656, 2018) — the discreet variant of the Leica M10 featuring a quieter shutter mechanism (~10 dB reduction), removal of the Leica red dot branding, and a touchscreen for menu navigation. Shares the M10's 24 MP full-frame CMOS sensor and identical image quality. Records native DNG files; shutter count readable from EXIF MakerNote. Estimated shutter life ~150,000 actuations (not officially published by Leica; same mechanism as the standard M10). Shutter count not accessible via in-camera menu — DNG file is the only source. Covers M10-P vs M10 premium justification (quiet shutter, no red dot, touchscreen), M10 family comparison table, Leica shutter service costs (~€500–1,000+), and used-camera buying guidance.
- [Leica M10-R Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/leica-m10-r-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Leica M10-R (2020) — Leica's 40.89 MP BSI-CMOS high-resolution variant of the M10, sharing the same body and cloth focal-plane shutter. Records native DNG files (~75–85 MB uncompressed, ~40–50 MB compressed); shutter count readable from EXIF. Estimated shutter life ~150,000 actuations (not officially published by Leica). Covers M10-R vs M11 comparison (tri-resolution sensor, USB charging, silent shutter), DNG storage requirements, and used-camera buying guidance.
- [Leica SL2 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/leica-sl2-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Leica SL2 (2019, 47.3 MP) full-frame L-mount mirrorless camera. Records native DNG files; shutter count readable from EXIF. Estimated shutter life ~150,000–200,000 actuations (not officially published). Covers the SL2 vs SL2-S use case differences (stills vs video), IP54 weather sealing, 5-axis IBIS, L-Mount Alliance compatibility, and buying guidance.
- [Leica SL2-S Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/leica-sl2-s-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Leica SL2-S (2020) — Leica's video-optimised full-frame L-mount mirrorless with a 24.6 MP BSI CMOS sensor. Records native DNG files; shutter count readable from EXIF via shuttercount.app or ExifTool. Estimated shutter life ~150,000–200,000 actuations (not officially published). Covers the SL2-S vs SL2 differences (24.6 MP for low-light vs 47.3 MP for resolution, higher ISO ceiling, faster electronic burst up to 25 fps, improved 4K video), why SL2-S bodies often have very low mechanical shutter counts despite heavy video use (video doesn't increment mechanical shutter), IP54 dust/splash protection, 5-axis IBIS (5.5 stops), L-Mount Alliance lens compatibility (Panasonic, Sigma), and used-camera buying guidance including translucent mirror inspection and CFexpress B slot condition.

- [Leica SL3 Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/leica-sl3-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Leica SL3 (Typ 10000, 2024) — Leica's 60 MP BSI CMOS full-frame L-mount mirrorless with 5-axis IBIS, CFexpress Type B + SD UHS-II dual slots, 30 fps electronic burst, and IP54 weather sealing. Records native DNG files; shutter count readable from EXIF via shuttercount.app or ExifTool. Estimated shutter life ~500,000 actuations (not officially published by Leica). Covers SL3 vs SL2 upgrades (60 MP vs 47.3 MP, IBIS added), electronic shutter mode impact on count, DNG EXIF extraction method, Leica L-mount compatibility (Panasonic S-series, Sigma fp), and used-camera buying guidance including Leica service cost considerations.

## Sigma Camera Shutter Count Pages

- [Sigma fp Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/sigma-fp-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Sigma fp (2019) — Sigma's world's smallest/lightest full-frame mirrorless, 24.6 MP L-mount, electronic shutter only, DNG format. Like the fp L, it has NO mechanical shutter — no rated shutter life applies. DNG files include an exposure counter that ShutterCount can read, but this reflects total electronic exposures only. Covers what to evaluate when buying used (sensor condition, USB-C port, battery contacts) and comparison with the fp L.
- [Sigma fp L Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/sigma-fp-l-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Sigma fp L (2021) — Sigma's 61 MP full-frame L-mount mirrorless using the same sensor as the Sony A7R IV. The fp L has NO mechanical shutter — electronic shutter only. No traditional shutter count or rated lifespan applies. DNG files include an exposure counter (total electronic exposures) that ShutterCount can read, but this has no mechanical wear implications. Covers what to check instead when buying a used fp L, fp vs fp L differences, and L-mount ecosystem compatibility.

## Ricoh Camera Shutter Count Pages

- [Ricoh GR III Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/ricoh-gr-iii-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Ricoh GR III (2019) — 24.2 MP APS-C CMOS compact with 28mm f/2.8 fixed lens, IBIS, and native DNG RAW output. Estimated shutter life ~200,000 actuations (not officially published by Ricoh). Shutter count readable from DNG EXIF MakerNote. Covers the electronic shutter option (no mechanical wear), lens dust ingestion as a key used-camera inspection point, comparison with the GR IIIx, and why deliberate street photographers often accumulate counts slowly.
- [Ricoh GR IIIx Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/ricoh-gr-iiix-shutter-count/): Shutter count guide for the Ricoh GR IIIx (2021) — 24.2 MP APS-C CMOS compact with a 40mm f/2.8 equivalent fixed lens (vs the GR III's 28mm). Shares the same sensor, shutter mechanism, body, and DNG RAW format as the GR III. Estimated shutter life ~200,000 actuations (not officially published by Ricoh). Covers how to check via DNG EXIF MakerNote, electronic shutter impact, and the key GR III vs GR IIIx differences for used-camera buyers.

- [相机快门寿命 — 各品牌机型快门额定次数完整表](https://shuttercount.app/zh/kuaimen-shouming/): Full shutter lifespan reference table for Canon, Nikon, Sony, Fujifilm, and Olympus models. Targets 相机快门寿命 (camera shutter lifespan).
- [Canon 相机快门次数在线查询 — 免费](https://shuttercount.app/zh/canon/): Canon brand page in Chinese listing all supported EOS R mirrorless and EOS DSLR models with their rated shutter lives. Targets Canon相机快门次数 (Canon camera shutter count).

SEO-optimized content pages in Japanese targeting high-volume Google Japan search queries.

- [中古カメラのシャッター回数 — 購入前に確認すべき基準](https://shuttercount.app/ja/chuko-camera/): Buyer's guide for used cameras on Japanese marketplaces (Mercari, Yahoo Auctions). Includes condition rating table and per-model shutter tolerance guide. Targets 中古カメラ シャッター回数 (used camera shutter count).
- [カメラのシャッター寿命 — メーカー別の耐久回数の目安](https://shuttercount.app/ja/shutter-jumyo/): Full shutter lifespan reference tables for Canon, Nikon, Sony, Fujifilm, and OM System models. Includes advice on extending shutter life. Targets シャッター寿命 (shutter lifespan).
- [シャッター枚数とは — 回数との違いと無料確認ツール](https://shuttercount.app/ja/shutter-maisuu/): Clarifies that シャッター枚数 (shutter maisuu) and シャッター回数 are synonymous terms for shutter actuations. Answers common questions about electronic shutter, video, and burst shooting. Targets シャッター枚数 (shutter shot count).

Includes shutter failure symptoms and replacement cost guidance. Targets zár élettartam (shutter lifespan).
- [Maximális zárszám — Modellenként mikor éri el a határt?](https://shuttercount.app/hu/maximalis-zarszam/): Condition rating table (A–D) by usage percentage relative to the rated maximum, with per-model maximum shutter count data for the most popular Canon, Nikon, Sony, and Fujifilm models. ## Informational / Editorial Pages

- [What Is Shutter Count?](https://shuttercount.app/what-is-shutter-count/): Explains what shutter count is, why it matters when buying a used camera, and how to check it for free. Covers mechanical shutter actuations and the difference between camera classes.
- [Camera Shutter Count Limits](https://shuttercount.app/shutter-count-limits/): Complete reference table of rated shutter lifespan (actuation counts) for Canon, Nikon, Sony, and Fujifilm cameras — from entry-level to professional bodies.
- [How to Check Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/how-to-check-shutter-count/): Step-by-step guide for checking shutter count on any camera for free using ShutterCount. Works with Canon CR3, Nikon NEF, Sony ARW, Fujifilm RAF, and more — no software to install.
- [Used Camera Buying Guide](https://shuttercount.app/used-camera-buying-guide/): Complete checklist for buying a used mirrorless or DSLR camera. Covers shutter count verification, sensor check, physical inspection, and price negotiation tips for Canon, Nikon, Sony, and Fujifilm.
- [Free Shutter Count Checker](https://shuttercount.app/shutter-count-free-tool/): Overview of the free browser-based shutter count checker. Nothing is uploaded; 100% private. Supports Canon, Nikon, Sony, Fujifilm, and more.
- [Camera Shutter Count by Brand](https://shuttercount.app/shutter-count-by-brand/): Compares rated shutter life expectancy across Canon, Nikon, Sony, and Fujifilm — from entry-level to professional bodies.
- [Camera Shutter Replacement Cost](https://shuttercount.app/camera-shutter-replacement-cost/): Typical shutter repair costs for Canon, Nikon, Sony, and Fujifilm cameras, and how to decide whether repair or replacement makes more sense based on shutter count.
- [Electronic vs Mechanical Shutter](https://shuttercount.app/electronic-vs-mechanical-shutter/): Explains the difference between mechanical, EFCS, and electronic shutters — and which ones add to your camera's shutter count.
- [Mirrorless vs DSLR Shutter Count](https://shuttercount.app/mirrorless-vs-dslr-shutter-count/): Compares shutter life expectancy, mechanical differences, and real-world durability between mirrorless and DSLR cameras.

## FAQ Pages

- [How Many Shutter Actuations Is Too Many?](https://shuttercount.app/faq/how-many-shutter-actuations-is-too-many/): A count above 50–80% of the manufacturer's rated life is considered high. Explains what is acceptable for each camera class.
- [Does Shutter Count Affect Camera Value?](https://shuttercount.app/faq/does-shutter-count-affect-camera-value/): Yes — explains how shutter count affects used camera value, how buyers and sellers use it to negotiate price, and when it stops being relevant.
- [What Shutter Count Is Good for a Used Camera?](https://shuttercount.app/faq/what-shutter-count-is-good-for-used-camera/): A good shutter count for a used camera is under 30% of its rated life. Covers what counts to look for by camera brand and model when buying second-hand.

## Portuguese SEO Pages (/pt/)

SEO-optimized content pages in Portuguese targeting Brazil and Portugal search queries.

- [Verificar Disparos da Câmera Online](https://shuttercount.app/pt/verificar-disparos/): How to verify camera shutter actuations online for free — no software, compatible with Canon, Nikon, Sony, and more.

- [Canon — Verificar Disparos Online](https://shuttercount.app/pt/canon/): Canon brand page in Portuguese listing supported EOS R mirrorless and EOS DSLR models with rated shutter lives.
- [Nikon — Verificar Disparos Online](https://shuttercount.app/pt/nikon/): Nikon brand page in Portuguese covering supported D-series DSLR and Z-series mirrorless models.

- [Disparos Máximos por Modelo](https://shuttercount.app/pt/disparos-maximos/): Complete table of maximum certified actuation counts for Canon, Nikon, Sony, Fujifilm, and Olympus cameras.
- [Ver Disparos pelos Dados EXIF](https://shuttercount.app/pt/exif-disparos-gratis/): Explains how EXIF metadata stores shot count and how to read it for free online with ShutterCount.
- [Zoner Studio vs Adobe Lightroom Comparação](https://shuttercount.app/pt/zoner-photo-studio-vs-lightroom-comparacao/): Comparação detalhada do Zoner Studio X e Adobe Lightroom Classic: edição RAW, catalogação, processamento em lote, modelo de preços (assinatura vs. licença perpétua) e editor de camadas integrado. Destinado a fotógrafos Windows que buscam uma alternativa mais acessível ao Lightroom.

Dirigida a fotógrafos en Windows que buscan una alternativa más asequible a Lightroom.

- [Zoner Studio vs Adobe Lightroom Vergleich](https://shuttercount.app/de/zoner-photo-studio-vs-lightroom-vergleich/): Detaillierter Vergleich von Zoner Studio X und Adobe Lightroom Classic: RAW-Entwicklung, Katalogisierung, Stapelverarbeitung, Preismodell (Abonnement vs. Einmalkauf) und integrierter Ebeneneditor. Richtet sich an Windows-Fotografen, die eine günstigere Lightroom-Alternative suchen.

## Ukrainian SEO Pages (/uk/)

SEO-optimized content pages in Ukrainian targeting Ukraine and the Ukrainian-speaking diaspora. Ukraine has an active photography community with a strong used-camera market (OLX, Facebook Marketplace, Rozetka). Key search terms: лічильник затвора, перевірити лічильник затвора, ресурс затвора, максимальна кількість спрацювань, купити вживаний фотоапарат.

- [Лічильник затвора фотоапарата — що це і як перевірити](https://shuttercount.app/uk/lichylnyk-zatvora/): Лічильник затвора показує, скільки разів спрацював затвор вашої камери. Дізнайтесь лічильник безкоштовно онлайн — без завантаження файлів на сервер, без встановлення програм. Targets лічильник затвора (shutter count).
- [Як перевірити лічильник затвора фотоапарата онлайн — безкоштовно](https://shuttercount.app/uk/perevirty-lichylnyk/): Покрокова інструкція з перевірки лічильника затвора для Canon, Nikon, Sony, Fujifilm — безкоштовно й повністю локально, без встановлення програм. Targets перевірити лічильник затвора (check shutter count).
- [Ресурс затвора фотоапарата — скільки спрацювань витримає камера](https://shuttercount.app/uk/resurs-zatvora/): Таблиця ресурсу затвора за класами камер, вплив на вартість при перепродажі, різниця між механічним і електронним затвором. Targets ресурс затвора (shutter lifespan).
- [Максимальна кількість спрацювань затвора — таблиця Canon, Nikon, Sony, Fujifilm](https://shuttercount.app/uk/maksymalna-kilkist-spratsyuvan/): Детальні таблиці максимальних спрацювань затвора для популярних моделей Canon, Nikon, Sony і Fujifilm, з формулою розрахунку відсотка використаного ресурсу. Targets максимальна кількість спрацювань затвора (maximum shutter actuations).
- [Купити вживаний фотоапарат — перевірка затвора перед покупкою](https://shuttercount.app/uk/kupy-vzhyvanyy-fotoaparat/): Посібник з купівлі вживаної камери в Україні (OLX, Facebook Marketplace, Rozetka). Покрокова перевірка лічильника затвора, таблиця оцінки стану A–E, чекліст огляду. Targets купити вживаний фотоапарат (buy used camera).

- [شراء كاميرا مستعملة — تحقق من عداد الغالق أولاً](https://shuttercount.app/ar/kamera-musta3mala/): Guide to buying a used camera: why checking shutter count is essential, how to evaluate the reading, and what replacement costs to expect for Canon, Nikon, Sony.
- [قراءة بيانات EXIF مجاناً](https://shuttercount.app/ar/exif-majani/): How EXIF metadata stores the shutter count and how to read it for free online with ShutterCount — no registration, no software, fully local in the browser.

## Persian (Farsi) SEO Pages (/fa/)

SEO-optimized content pages in Persian (فارسی) targeting the Iranian market — approximately 85 million native speakers in Iran and 110+ million total Persian speakers worldwide. Iran has an active photography community, a large used-camera market, and over 67 million internet users. All pages are right-to-left (RTL) and use the Vazirmatn Persian font for optimal readability. URL slugs use Finglish (romanized Persian).

- [شمارش شاتر دوربین — چیست و چگونه بررسی کنیم](https://shuttercount.app/fa/shomar-shater/): Explains what camera shutter count (شمارش شاتر) is, why it matters, how the shutter wears mechanically, and how to check it for free with ShutterCount. Includes shutter lifespan table by camera class (entry to professional) and comparison of checking methods. Targets شمارش شاتر دوربین (camera shutter count).
- [بررسی شاتر دوربین — رایگان آنلاین در چند ثانیه](https://shuttercount.app/fa/barresi-shater/): Step-by-step guide for checking camera shutter count using ShutterCount — no software, no account needed. Lists all supported brands and RAW file formats (Canon CR2/CR3, Nikon NEF, Sony ARW, Fujifilm RAF, Olympus ORF, Panasonic RW2). Includes guidance on acceptable shutter count thresholds. Targets بررسی شاتر دوربین (check camera shutter).
- [حداکثر شاتر دوربین — جدول Canon، Nikon، Sony](https://shuttercount.app/fa/hadaksar-shater/): Complete reference table of maximum certified shutter actuations for Canon, Nikon, Sony and Fujifilm camera models, with guidance on calculating remaining lifespan percentage. Targets حداکثر شاتر دوربین (maximum camera shutter count).
- [خرید دوربین دست دوم — ابتدا شاتر را بررسی کنید](https://shuttercount.app/fa/dorobin-dast-dom/): Buyer's guide for second-hand cameras in Iran: why checking shutter count is essential, an A–D condition grading table by usage percentage, a 7-item pre-purchase checklist, and shutter replacement cost guidance. Targets دوربین دست دوم (used camera).
- [اطلاعات EXIF رایگان — شمارش شاتر را آنلاین بخوانید](https://shuttercount.app/fa/exif-raygan/): Explains what EXIF metadata is, how each manufacturer stores shutter count in MakerNote tags, why social media photos lose EXIF data, and how ShutterCount processes files 100% locally with no server upload. Targets اطلاعات EXIF رایگان (free EXIF data).

## Hindi SEO Pages (/hi/)

SEO-optimized content pages in Hindi targeting the Indian market. India has one of the world's largest and fastest-growing internet user bases (750M+ users), with a large and active used camera market on platforms like OLX and Facebook Marketplace.

- [शटर काउंट क्या है? — कैमरा शटर काउंट मुफ्त जांचें](https://shuttercount.app/hi/shutter-count-kya-hai/): Overview page explaining what shutter count is, why it matters, and how to check it in Hindi. Includes shutter lifespan table by camera class and comparison of checking methods. Targets शटर काउंट क्या है (what is shutter count).

Targets शटर काउंट कैसे चेक करें (how to check shutter count).
- [सेकंड हैंड कैमरा खरीदने से पहले शटर काउंट जांचें](https://shuttercount.app/hi/second-hand-camera/): Buyer's guide for used cameras on Indian marketplaces (OLX, Facebook Marketplace). - [कैमरा शटर की उम्र — ब्रांड के अनुसार पूरी जानकारी](https://shuttercount.app/hi/shutter-umra/): Full shutter lifespan reference tables for Canon, Nikon, Sony, and Fujifilm models in Hindi. Includes shutter failure symptoms and replacement cost guidance. Targets कैमरा शटर उम्र (camera shutter lifespan).
- [EXIF से शटर काउंट मुफ्त जांचें — ऑनलाइन टूल](https://shuttercount.app/hi/exif-shutter-free/): Explains how EXIF MakerNote metadata stores shutter count per brand, how ShutterCount reads it locally without uploading files, and how to use ExifTool from the command line. Targets EXIF शटर काउंट (EXIF shutter count).

SEO-optimized content pages in Thai (ภาษาไทย) targeting Thailand — a country of 60 million native speakers with a significant and active photography community. Canon, Nikon, Sony and Fujifilm are the dominant brands.

Includes a shutter lifespan table by camera class (entry-level to professional) and step-by-step instructions. Targets "shutter count คืออะไร" (what is shutter count).

Targets "ตรวจสอบ shutter count" (check shutter count).
- [กล้องมือสอง — เช็ค Shutter Count ก่อนซื้อ](https://shuttercount.app/th/klong-meu-song/): Buyer's guide for second-hand cameras in Thailand (Kaidee, Facebook Marketplace, local camera shops). Includes condition grading table by shutter count percentage, inspection checklist, and popular used-camera models in the Thai market. Targets "กล้องมือสอง shutter count" (used camera shutter count).
- [จำนวนชัตเตอร์สูงสุด — อายุการใช้งานกล้องแต่ละรุ่น](https://shuttercount.app/th/shutter-count-sungsut/): Reference tables of maximum rated shutter actuations for popular Canon, Nikon, Sony and Fujifilm camera models, with guidance on interpreting remaining lifespan. Targets "จำนวนชัตเตอร์สูงสุด" (maximum shutter count) and "อายุชัตเตอร์กล้อง" (camera shutter lifespan).
- [เช็ค Shutter Count จาก EXIF ฟรี — ไม่ต้องส่งไฟล์](https://shuttercount.app/th/exif-shutter-free/): Explains how EXIF MakerNote data stores shutter count, lists all supported file formats (JPEG, CR3, NEF, ARW, RAF, ORF, RW2, DNG), and highlights ShutterCount's privacy-first approach (no server upload, 100% in-browser). Targets "shutter count ฟรี" and "exif shutter count ฟรี" (free EXIF shutter count).

- [Διάρκεια Ζωής Κλείστρου — Πόσες Λήψεις Αντέχει η Μηχανή σας;](https://shuttercount.app/el/diarkeia-zois-klistrou/): Covers shutter lifespan concept, factors affecting longevity (burst mode, temperature, maintenance), remaining-lifespan calculation formula with worked example, and signs of shutter failure. Notes that electronic shutter does not increment the mechanical counter. Targets "διάρκεια ζωής κλείστρου" (shutter lifespan).
- [EXIF Κλείστρου Δωρεάν — Διάβασε τον Αριθμό Λήψεων από RAW](https://shuttercount.app/el/exif-klistrou-dorean/): Explains where shutter count is stored in EXIF MakerNote data per manufacturer, lists all supported RAW formats (CR3, CR2, NEF, ARW, RAF, ORF, RW2, DNG, JPEG), explains why social media photos lose EXIF data, and describes ShutterCount's fully client-side privacy-first approach. Targets "EXIF κλείστρου δωρεάν" (free EXIF shutter data).
