Targets পুরনো ক্যামেরা কেনা (buying used camera).
- [ক্যামেরা শাটারের আয়ু — ব্র্যান্ড অনুযায়ী সম্পূর্ণ তথ্য](https://shuttercount.app/bn/shutter-ayu/): Full shutter lifespan reference tables for Canon, Nikon, Sony and Fujifilm camera models in Bengali. Includes shutter failure symptom list and a practical remaining-lifespan formula. Targets ক্যামেরা শাটার আয়ু (camera shutter lifespan).
- [EXIF থেকে শাটার কাউন্ট বিনামূল্যে চেক করুন — অনলাইন টুল](https://shuttercount.app/bn/exif-shutter-free/): Explains where shutter count is stored in EXIF MakerNote data per manufacturer (Canon CR3/CR2, Nikon NEF, Sony ARW, Fujifilm RAF, Olympus ORF, Panasonic RW2), includes ExifTool command-line examples, explains why social media photos lose EXIF data, and describes ShutterCount's fully client-side privacy-first approach. Targets EXIF শাটার কাউন্ট (EXIF shutter count).

## Uzbek SEO Pages (/uz/)

SEO-optimized content pages in Uzbek (O'zbek tili) targeting Uzbekistan — a country of 35M+ speakers and a rapidly growing digital economy in Central Asia. Uzbekistan's emerging middle class is actively purchasing cameras (Canon, Nikon, Sony and Fujifilm are popular brands), and used-camera markets are active on platforms such as OLX.uz, Olx and local camera shops in Tashkent, Samarkand and Bukhara. All pages are written in standard Uzbek Latin script (the official script since 1993) with romanized URL slugs.

- [Shutter Count Nima? Kamera Zatvori Soni Haqida](https://shuttercount.app/uz/shutter-count-nima/): Overview page explaining what shutter count (zatvor soni) is, why it matters for used-camera evaluation, and how to check it for free with ShutterCount. Includes shutter lifespan table by camera class (entry-level to professional), analogy with car mileage, explanation of mechanical vs electronic shutter impact on counter, and four-step guide for checking via RAW file. Targets "shutter count nima" (what is shutter count).
- [Kamera Shutter Count Qanday Tekshiriladi — Canon, Nikon, Sony](https://shuttercount.app/uz/shutter-count-tekshirish/): Step-by-step guide (5 steps) for checking camera shutter count using ShutterCount, with a visual grid of supported RAW file formats (Canon CR3/CR2, Nikon NEF, Sony ARW, Fujifilm RAF, Olympus ORF, Panasonic RW2, Adobe DNG, JPEG), brand-specific instructions for Canon, Nikon, Sony and Fujifilm, and FAQ covering no-detection causes and privacy. Targets "shutter count tekshirish" (check shutter count) and "kamera shutter count qanday tekshiriladi" (how to check camera shutter count).
- [Ishlatilgan Kamera Sotib Olish — Shutter Count Tekshirish Qo'llanmasi](https://shuttercount.app/uz/ishlatilgan-kamera-sotib-olish/): Buyer's guide for second-hand cameras with an A–E condition grading table by shutter count percentage, 8-item inspection checklist (shutter count, sensor dust, LCD/EVF, buttons, battery, mount, coatings, physical damage), pricing guidance by condition band, red-flag warnings, and hidden cost breakdown. Targets "ishlatilgan kamera sotib olish" (buying used camera) and "b/u kamera" (second-hand camera).
- [Kamera Shutter Count Chegarasi — Canon, Nikon, Sony, Fujifilm](https://shuttercount.app/uz/shutter-count-chegarasi/): Reference tables of maximum rated shutter actuations for popular Canon (EOS R1 through RP, plus DSLR), Nikon (Z and D series), Sony (Alpha series) and Fujifilm (X and GFX series) camera models, with camera-class summary table and guidance on what to do when approaching or exceeding the rated limit. Targets "shutter count chegarasi" (shutter count limit) and "zatvor soni limiti" (shutter actuation limit).
- [Mexanik va Elektron Zatvor Farqi — Shutter Count ta'siri](https://shuttercount.app/uz/mexanik-elektron-zatvor/): Explains the three shutter types (mechanical, EFCS, fully electronic / silent), which increment the shutter count and which do not, with a side-by-side comparison card (pros/cons) and a feature matrix table covering rolling shutter risk, flash sync, burst speed, and mechanical wear. Includes guidance on global shutter technology (Sony A9 III) and practical tips on which mode to use for different genres (portrait, sport, wedding). Targets "mexanik va elektron zatvor" (mechanical and electronic shutter) and "zatvor farqi" (shutter difference).

## Tamil SEO Pages (/ta/)

SEO-optimized content pages in Tamil (தமிழ்) targeting Tamil-speaking audiences — approximately 77 million native speakers in Tamil Nadu (India), Sri Lanka, Singapore, and Malaysia, plus a large global diaspora. Tamil Nadu is home to a vibrant photography community, and Chennai (the regional capital) has an active used-camera market on platforms such as OLX and Facebook Marketplace. Canon, Nikon, and Sony are the dominant brands. All pages are written in Tamil script with romanized URL slugs.

- [ஷட்டர் எண்ணிக்கை என்றால் என்ன? — கேமரா ஷட்டர் இலவசமாக சரிபார்க்கலாம்](https://shuttercount.app/ta/shutter-ennikai/): Overview page explaining what shutter count (ஷட்டர் எண்ணிக்கை) is, why it matters for used-camera evaluation, and how to check it for free with ShutterCount. Covers the three shutter types (mechanical, EFCS, electronic/silent) and which increment the counter. Includes shutter lifespan table by camera class (entry-level to professional) and comparison of checking methods. Targets ஷட்டர் எண்ணிக்கை என்றால் என்ன (what is shutter count).
- [ஷட்டர் எண்ணிக்கை எப்படி சரிபார்ப்பது — இலவச ஆன்லைன் முறை](https://shuttercount.app/ta/shutter-ennikai-paarkka/): Step-by-step guide (3 steps) for checking camera shutter count using ShutterCount, with a methods comparison table (ShutterCount vs ExifTool vs camera menu) and full list of supported brands and file formats (Canon CR3/CR2, Nikon NEF, Sony ARW, Fujifilm RAF, Olympus ORF, Panasonic RW2, Adobe DNG, JPEG). Targets ஷட்டர் எண்ணிக்கை சரிபார்க்க (how to check shutter count).
- [கேமரா ஷட்டர் ஆயுட்காலம் — பிராண்டுகளின்படி முழு விவரம்](https://shuttercount.app/ta/shutter-aayul/): Full shutter lifespan reference tables for Canon (EOS R1 through R50, plus DSLRs), Nikon (Z9 through Z5, plus D-series), Sony (A1 through A6700), and Fujifilm (GFX through X100VI) camera models in Tamil. Includes shutter failure symptom checklist and estimated replacement costs in Indian Rupees. Targets கேமரா ஷட்டர் ஆயுள் (camera shutter lifespan).
- [பழைய கேமரா வாங்குவது எப்படி — ஷட்டர் எண்ணிக்கை சரிபார்க்கவும்](https://shuttercount.app/ta/pazhaya-kamera-vangi/): Buyer's guide for second-hand cameras in India (OLX, Facebook Marketplace). Includes A–D condition grading table by shutter count percentage, 8-item inspection checklist (shutter count, sensor dust, LCD/EVF, mount, battery, AF, image stabilization, EXIF date verification), and warning about EXIF data manipulation. Targets பழைய கேமரா வாங்க (buying used camera).
- [EXIF மூலம் ஷட்டர் எண்ணிக்கை இலவசமாக — ஆன்லைன் கருவி](https://shuttercount.app/ta/exif-shutter-ilavasam/): Explains what EXIF metadata is, how each manufacturer stores shutter count in MakerNote tags (with format table per brand), why social media photos (WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook) lose EXIF data, ExifTool command-line examples for Nikon, Sony, and Canon, and ShutterCount's fully client-side privacy-first approach (no server upload, 100% in-browser). Targets EXIF ஷட்டர் எண்ணிக்கை (EXIF shutter count).

## Malay SEO Pages (/ms/)

SEO-optimized content pages in Malay (Bahasa Melayu) targeting Malaysia — a country of 33 million native Malay speakers with a rapidly growing photography market. Malaysia has an active used-camera community on platforms such as Mudah.my, Carousell Malaysia, Facebook Marketplace and Lowyat.net, with Canon, Nikon and Sony being the dominant brands. Two keyword variants are covered: the formal Malay term "pengatup" and the colloquial loanword "shutter" (both widely used in Malaysian photography communities). All pages are written in standard Bahasa Malaysia with romanized URL slugs.

**Formal term variant ("kiraan pengatup"):**
- [Kiraan Pengatup Kamera — Apa Itu dan Cara Memeriksanya](https://shuttercount.app/ms/kiraan-pengatup/): Overview page explaining what shutter count (kiraan pengatup) is, why it matters for used-camera evaluation, and how to check it for free with ShutterCount. Includes shutter lifespan table by camera class (entry-level to professional), explanation of electronic vs mechanical shutter impact on the counter, and comparison of checking methods (ShutterCount vs ExifTool vs camera menu). Targets "kiraan pengatup" (shutter count).
- [Semak Kiraan Pengatup Kamera — Percuma Dalam Talian](https://shuttercount.app/ms/semak-kiraan-pengatup/): Step-by-step guide (4 steps) for checking camera shutter count using ShutterCount, with warning about social media EXIF stripping (WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook), full table of supported brands and file formats (Canon CR3/CR2, Nikon NEF, Sony ARW, Fujifilm RAF, Olympus ORF, Panasonic RW2, Adobe DNG, JPEG), and comparison table of checking methods (ShutterCount vs ExifTool vs camera menu vs service centre). Targets "semak kiraan pengatup" (check shutter count).
- [Had Kiraan Pengatup Kamera — Jadual Lengkap Canon, Nikon, Sony](https://shuttercount.app/ms/had-kiraan-pengatup/): Reference tables of maximum rated shutter actuations for popular Canon (EOS R1 through 250D/850D), Nikon (Z9 through Z50/Zfc), Sony (A1 through ZV-E10 II) and Fujifilm (GFX 100 II through X-T50) camera models, with a practical A–D condition grading table by shutter count percentage and remaining-lifespan formula with worked example. Targets "had kiraan pengatup" (shutter count limit).
- [Baca EXIF Pengatup Percuma — Kiraan Pengatup dari Data EXIF](https://shuttercount.app/ms/exif-pengatup-percuma/): Explains what EXIF metadata and MakerNote data are, how each manufacturer stores shutter count in different EXIF locations per format (Canon CR3 CTMD offset, Nikon NEF tag 0x00A7, Sony ARW IFD, Fujifilm RAF MakerNote, Olympus ORF, Panasonic RW2), why social media photos lose EXIF data, and ShutterCount's fully client-side privacy-first approach (no server upload, 100% in-browser). Targets "exif pengatup percuma" (free EXIF shutter count).

**Colloquial loanword variant ("kiraan shutter") — added 2026-05-12:**
- [Kiraan Shutter Kamera — Apa Itu & Cara Semak](https://shuttercount.app/ms/kiraan-shutter/): Overview page explaining what camera shutter count is, why it matters, and how to check it for free. Includes 3-step how-to guide, privacy guarantee, supported brands and file formats (Canon CR3/CR2, Nikon NEF, Sony ARW, Fujifilm RAF, Olympus ORF, Panasonic RW2, JPEG). Targets "kiraan shutter kamera" (camera shutter count).
- [Cara Semak Kiraan Shutter Kamera — Canon, Nikon, Sony](https://shuttercount.app/ms/cara-semak-kiraan-shutter/): Step-by-step 4-step guide for checking camera shutter count using ShutterCount, with brand-specific information for Canon, Nikon, Sony and Fujifilm, warning about EXIF data loss via social media (WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook), and explanation of why shutter count matters for used-camera purchases. Targets "cara semak kiraan shutter" (how to check shutter count).
- [Had Kiraan Shutter Kamera — Jangka Hayat Shutter](https://shuttercount.app/ms/had-kiraan-shutter/): Reference table of maximum rated shutter actuations by camera class (entry DSLR, semi-pro DSLR, pro DSLR, Sony mirrorless, Canon R mirrorless, Nikon Z mirrorless), with A–D condition grading guide and shutter replacement cost estimate in Malaysian Ringgit (RM 500–RM 2,000). Targets "had kiraan shutter kamera" (camera shutter count limit).
- [Beli Kamera Terpakai — Panduan Semak Kiraan Shutter](https://shuttercount.app/ms/kamera-terpakai/): Buyer's guide for second-hand cameras in Malaysia (Mudah.my, Carousell, Lowyat.net). Includes 4-step purchase process, A–D condition grading by shutter count percentage, additional inspection checklist (sensor dust, battery health, accessories, service history), and red-flag warnings. Targets "kamera terpakai shutter count" (used camera shutter count).
- [Semak Kiraan Shutter EXIF Percuma — Dalam Pelayar](https://shuttercount.app/ms/exif-shutter-percuma/): Explains what EXIF metadata is and how manufacturers store shutter count in the MakerNote section, how ShutterCount reads it locally without uploading files, supported RAW formats (CR3, CR2, NEF, ARW, RAF, ORF, RW2, JPEG), and why social media strips EXIF data. Targets "semak kiraan shutter percuma" (free shutter count check).

Privacy guarantee explained. Targets "શટર કાઉન્ટ કેવી રીતે ચેક કરવો" (how to check shutter count).
- [વાપરેલો કૅમેરો ખરીદતા પહેલાં શટર કાઉન્ટ ચેક કરો](https://shuttercount.app/gu/vaparelo-camera/): Buyer's guide for used cameras on Indian marketplaces (OLX, Facebook Marketplace, Flipkart Renewed). - [કૅમેરા Shutter ની ઉંમર — Brand પ્રમાણે સંપૂર્ણ માહિતી](https://shuttercount.app/gu/shutter-ni-umra/): Full shutter lifespan reference tables for Canon, Nikon, Sony, and Fujifilm models in Gujarati. Includes shutter failure symptoms and note on shutter replacement costs in India (₹5,000–₹20,000). Targets "કૅમેરા shutter ઉંમર" (camera shutter lifespan).

Targets "EXIF shutter count" (EXIF shutter count free).

## Amharic SEO Pages (/am/)

SEO-optimized content pages in Amharic (አማርኛ) targeting Ethiopia — Africa's second most populous country with ~130 million people and a rapidly growing internet-connected middle class. Ethiopia has an active photography community, growing tourism sector, and increasing camera ownership, making it an emerging market for camera-related searches. Amharic is the official language of Ethiopia and uses the unique Ge'ez (Ethiopic) script. All pages are written in Amharic script with romanized URL slugs. Noto Sans Ethiopic font is used for optimal Ge'ez script rendering.

- [ሸተር ካውንት ምን ነው? — ካሜራ ሸተር ካውንት ነፃ ያረጋግጡ](https://shuttercount.app/am/shutter-count-minu-new/): Overview page explaining what shutter count (ሸተር ካውንት) is, why it matters for used-camera evaluation, and how to check it for free with ShutterCount. Covers shutter lifespan table by camera class (entry-level to professional: 100,000–500,000+ shots), the three situations where shutter count is most important (buying used, selling, planning maintenance), and a privacy notice explaining all processing is 100% local. Targets "ሸተር ካውንት ምን ነው" (what is shutter count).
- [ሸተር ካውንት ማረጋገጥ — ነፃ ኦንላይን ዘዴ](https://shuttercount.app/am/shutter-count-masavere/): Step-by-step 3-step guide in Amharic for checking camera shutter count using ShutterCount, with warning about EXIF data loss via social media (WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook), full table of supported brands and file formats (Canon CR3/CR2, Nikon NEF, Sony ARW, Fujifilm RAF, Olympus ORF, Panasonic RW2, Adobe DNG, JPEG), and comparison table of checking methods (ShutterCount vs ExifTool vs camera menu). Targets "ሸተር ካውንት ማረጋገጥ" (how to check shutter count).
- [ያገለገለ ካሜራ ሲገዙ ሸተር ካውንት ያረጋግጡ — ሙሉ መመሪያ](https://shuttercount.app/am/yetebelete-camera/): Buyer's guide for second-hand cameras. Includes A–D condition grading table by shutter usage percentage (A: 0–30%, B: 30–60%, C: 60–80%, D: 80%+), 7-item inspection checklist (shutter count, sensor dust check at f/16, LCD/EVF pixel test, autofocus continuous test, battery health, mount wobble, EXIF date verification), and warning about EXIF data manipulation by sellers. Targets "ያገለገለ ካሜራ" (used/second-hand camera).
- [ሸተር ካውንት ነፃ ያረጋግጡ — EXIF ዳታ ከRAW / JPEG](https://shuttercount.app/am/nesa-shutter-count/): Explains what EXIF metadata is and how manufacturers store shutter count in the MakerNote section of RAW and JPEG files, per-brand EXIF storage locations (Canon CTMD, Nikon Tag 0x00A7, Sony IFD, Fujifilm/Olympus/Panasonic MakerNote), why social media platforms (WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook) strip EXIF data, and ShutterCount's fully client-side privacy-first approach (no server upload, 100% in-browser). Targets "ሸተር ካውንት ነፃ" (free shutter count) and "ነፃ ሸተር ካውንት" (free shutter count).
- [ካሜራ ሸተር ካውንት ወሰን — Canon፣ Nikon፣ Sony ሙሉ ሠንጠረዥ](https://shuttercount.app/am/shutter-wessene/): Full shutter lifespan reference tables for Canon (EOS R1, R5/R5 II, R6/R6 II, R7, R8/R50, 1D X III, 90D, 250D/850D), Nikon (Z9, Z8, Z6 III/Z7 III, Z6 II/Z7 II, Z5 II, Z30/Zfc, D6, D7500), and Sony (A1, A9 III, A7R V, A7 IV, A7C II, A6700, ZV-E10 II) models in Amharic. Includes shutter failure symptom checklist (dark bands at frame edge, failed actuations, partial frames, speed errors) and note on planning for shutter replacement costs. Targets "ሸተር ካውንት ወሰን" (shutter count limit) and "ካሜራ ሸተር ዕድሜ" (camera shutter lifespan).

## Malayalam SEO Pages (/ml/)

SEO-optimized content pages in Malayalam (മലയാളം) targeting the ~35 million native Malayalam speakers, primarily in Kerala state — one of India's most literate states with a vibrant photography tradition, active outdoor and portrait photography community, and a strong used-camera market. Kerala photographers are active buyers and sellers of Canon, Nikon, Sony, and Fujifilm equipment. All pages are written in Malayalam script (Brahmic script unique to Kerala) with romanized URL slugs. Noto Sans Malayalam font is used for optimal rendering.

- [ഷട്ടർ കൗണ്ട് എന്താണ്? — ക്യാമറ ഷട്ടർ കൗണ്ട് സൗജന്യമായി പരിശോധിക്കുക](https://shuttercount.app/ml/shutter-count-enthaanu/): Overview page explaining what shutter count (ഷട്ടർ കൗണ്ട്) is, how the mechanical shutter works, why it matters for used-camera evaluation, and how to check it for free with ShutterCount. Covers shutter lifespan table by camera class (entry-level to professional: 100,000–500,000+ shots), mechanical vs electronic vs EFCS shutter differences, and three key situations where shutter count is most important. Targets "ഷട്ടർ കൗണ്ട് എന്താണ്" (what is shutter count).
- [ഷട്ടർ കൗണ്ട് എങ്ങനെ പരിശോധിക്കാം — Canon, Nikon, Sony, Fujifilm](https://shuttercount.app/ml/shutter-count-parisodhikkal/): Step-by-step 3-step guide in Malayalam for checking camera shutter count using ShutterCount. Covers supported RAW formats per brand (CR3/CR2 for Canon, NEF for Nikon, ARW for Sony, RAF for Fujifilm, ORF for Olympus, RW2 for Panasonic), why RAW files are required rather than JPEG, and a tip about mechanical vs silent shutter mode. Targets "ഷട്ടർ കൗണ്ട് പരിശോധിക്കൽ" (check shutter count).
- [ഉപയോഗിച്ച ക്യാമറ വാങ്ങൽ ഗൈഡ് — ഷട്ടർ കൗണ്ട് ഉൾപ്പെടെ](https://shuttercount.app/ml/upayogiccha-camera-vannal/): Buyer's guide for used cameras on Indian marketplaces. Includes A–D condition grading table by shutter usage percentage (A: 0–30%, B: 30–60%, C: 60–80%, D: 80%+), 5-item physical inspection checklist (sensor dust, lens mount, LCD/EVF, body, battery), and advice on requesting an original RAW file from the seller for shutter count verification. Targets "ഉപയോഗിച്ച ക്യാമറ വാങ്ങൽ" (used camera purchase).
- [ക്യാമറ ഷട്ടർ കൗണ്ട് പരിധി — Canon, Nikon, Sony, Fujifilm](https://shuttercount.app/ml/shutter-count-paridhi/): Full shutter lifespan reference tables for Canon (R50, R6 III, R5 II, 1D X III), Nikon (Z30/Z50, Z6 III, Z8, Z9, D6), Sony (A7 IV, A7R V), and Fujifilm (X-T5, X100VI) models in Malayalam. Explains rated shutter life as a statistical median and covers symptoms of approaching shutter failure and shutter replacement costs in India (₹6,000–₹25,000). Targets "ഷട്ടർ കൗണ്ട് പരിധി" (shutter count limit) and "ഷട്ടർ ആക്ച്വേഷൻ പരിധി" (shutter actuation limit).
- [ക്യാമറ ഷട്ടർ മാറ്റൽ ചെലവ് — ഇന്ത്യ (Canon, Nikon, Sony)](https://shuttercount.app/ml/camera-shutter-maattal/): Camera shutter replacement cost guide for Indian service centres, with brand-by-brand cost estimates (Canon ₹8,000–₹20,000, Nikon ₹7,000–₹18,000, Sony ₹8,000–₹22,000, Fujifilm ₹6,000–₹16,000). Covers shutter failure symptoms (changed click sound, partial dark frame, banding, shutter error code), tips for extending shutter life (electronic shutter, reducing burst mode), and advice on using authorized service centres. Targets "ക്യാമറ ഷട്ടർ മാറ്റൽ ചെലവ്" (camera shutter replacement cost).

## Optional

- [llms-full.txt](https://shuttercount.app/llms-full.txt): Extended version with full page descriptions and FAQ content for each camera model page.
